UNTIMELY FILING WILL RESULT IN TRIAL DATE REMAINING ON CALENDAR; FROM WHICH FURTHER REQUEST FOR TRIAL DATE CONTINUANCE WILL BE THROUGH NOTICED MOTION WITH DEPARTMENT 206.
